chunks.title: Description of Affliction
chunks.reason: A continuous monologue describing personal suffering and the feeling of being rejected by God.

chunks.title: Hope in God's Compassion
chunks.reason: A shift to hope based on the unceasing nature of God's lovingkindness and His reluctance to afflict.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance
chunks.reason: An argument about God's sovereignty followed by a call for the people to examine their ways and return to Him.

chunks.title: Lament over Destruction
chunks.reason: A description of God's anger and the resulting devastation, ending with weeping for the people.

chunks.title: Prayer for Vindication
chunks.reason: A personal plea for God to judge the enemies and a declaration of trust in His justice.
